Skupina každý deň zápasí o prežitie – musí čeliť krutým dinosaurom, nepriateľským neandertálcom, rase jašterích mužov aj mnohým iným hrozbám. Popritom sa snaží nájsť cestu späť do civilizácie. Každá epizóda prináša dve paralelné dobrodružstvá, ktoré odhaľujú nielen tajomstvá tohto zabudnutého sveta, ale aj charaktery jeho nečakaných obyvateľov.

programme.title: Kung Fu - Legenda pokračuje IV (2)
programme.desc: Kung Fu: Legenda pokračuje nadväzuje na kultový seriál Kung Fu zo 70. rokov. Príbeh sleduje majstra bojového umenia a filozofa Kwai Chang Caina (David Carradine), ktorý žije v súčasnom veľkomeste. Po rokoch odlúčenia sa znovu stretáva so svojím synom Peterom (Chris Potter), o ktorom si myslel, že zomrel ako malý chlapec. Peter, ktorý vyrastal ako sirota, sa stal nekompromisným policajným detektívom. Seriál kombinuje akčné prvky s dramatickými príbehmi, pričom čerpá z tradičnej východnej filozofie a bojových umení. Otec a syn spoločne čelia zločinu v modernom svete, pričom ich odlišné prístupy k spravodlivosti vedú k napätiu, ale aj hlbšiemu pochopeniu. Seriál prináša jedinečnú zmes duchovna, rodinných vzťahov a akcie, ktorá zaujala divákov po celom svete.

programme.title: Kung Fu - Legenda pokračuje IV (3)
programme.desc: Kung Fu: Legenda pokračuje nadväzuje na kultový seriál Kung Fu zo 70. rokov. Príbeh sleduje majstra bojového umenia a filozofa Kwai Chang Caina (David Carradine), ktorý žije v súčasnom veľkomeste. Po rokoch odlúčenia sa znovu stretáva so svojím synom Peterom (Chris Potter), o ktorom si myslel, že zomrel ako malý chlapec. Peter, ktorý vyrastal ako sirota, sa stal nekompromisným policajným detektívom. Seriál kombinuje akčné prvky s dramatickými príbehmi, pričom čerpá z tradičnej východnej filozofie a bojových umení. Otec a syn spoločne čelia zločinu v modernom svete, pričom ich odlišné prístupy k spravodlivosti vedú k napätiu, ale aj hlbšiemu pochopeniu. Seriál prináša jedinečnú zmes duchovna, rodinných vzťahov a akcie, ktorá zaujala divákov po celom svete.

programme.title: A-Tím III (4)
programme.desc: Plukovník Briggs sa stane novým veliteľom jednotky, ktorá sa usiluje chytiť A-Tím. Tentoraz veteráni vypočujú prosbu šéfky hasičov Annie Sandersovej, aby jej pomohli zachrániť hasičský zbor v mestečku, ktorý chce Roy Kelsey nahradiť súkromnou, lepšie vybavenou spoločnosťou Tristar. A neštíti sa ničoho, dokonca ani násilia na hasičoch a podpaľačstva. A-Tím sa púšťa do práce...

programme.title: A-Tím III (5)
programme.desc: Súrodenci John a Samantha Lawrenceovci požiadajú A-Tím o pomoc proti samozvanému odborárskemu predákovi Bullovi McEwanovi a jeho poskokom. V prestrojení za drevorubačov sa členovia A-Tímu snažia McEwanove vydieračské praktiky zaraziť.

programme.title: Čarodejnice VI (6)
programme.desc: Aby prinútil Piper, Phoebe a Paige viac sa sústrediť na svoje magické povinnosti, Chris sa spojí s démonom, ktorý na ne zosiela kúzlo a pošle ich do alternatívnej reality, kde sa im splnia ich najväčšie túžby. Kým sú sestry uväznené vo svojich vlastných alternatívnych svetoch, Leo konfrontuje Chrisa kvôli Valkýram a pohrozí mu, že o jeho činoch povie ostatným Starším – najmä o tom, že jednu z nich zabil, aby získal jej prívesok. Medzitým sa Leo a Piper nevedia zhodnúť na tom, ako sa postarať o chorého Wyatta.

programme.title: Čarodejnice VI (7)
programme.desc: Keď Paige uvidí, ako jej nového šéfa priamo pred jej očami zabije démon, zistí, že mu predal svoju dušu a démon si len prišiel vybrať dlh. Keď o tom povie Piper a Phoebe, je sklamaná, keď jej poradia, aby sa démona nepokúšala zastaviť a nezachraňovala ho. Paige však ich radu ignoruje a rozhodne sa pre obrovskú obeť, aby svojho šéfa zachránila.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210 III (24)
programme.desc: Kelly oslavuje osemnáste narodeniny a Donna s Davidom jej chystajú párty s prekvapením. Jej závislosť na práškoch na chudnutie ale naberie nečakané obrátky a oslávenkyňa náhle skolabuje. Medzitým sú Steve a Brandon pozvaní na účasť v televíznej súťaži, kde si súťažiaci hľadajú nových partnerov a ani ich už neprekvapí, že majú opäť rovnaký vkus na ženy, keď sa obaja zahľadia do rovnakého dievčaťa.

programme.title: Beverly Hills 90210 III (25)
programme.desc: Posledný ročník má pred sebou vyhlásenie volieb "najlepších" pre školskú ročenku. Najúspešnejšieho muža a ženu vyhrávajú Brandon s Andreou, najkrajší sú Kelly s Dylanom, najkrajší úsmev má Donna a najväčší talent je podľa ankety David. Brenda, ktorá nezískala žiadne ocenenie sa cíti čoraz viac ako outsider a spomína na svoje rodné mesto. Podáva si preto prihlášku aj na univerzitu v Minnesote. Kelly je naštvaná, že Dylan jej nechce ukázať svoj článok, zatiaľ čo Andrea už ho čítala. Steve má štyri lístky na zápas Lakers a zaúkoluje Brandona zohnať pre nich dvoch doprovod. Ten ale nedopatrením pozve svojich rodičov.

programme.title: M*A*S*H II (18)
programme.desc: Hawkeye a Trapper sa rozhodnú pomôcť vojakovi, ktorý trpí pre svoj obrovský nos. Pozvú do tábora Hawkeyeho priateľa - plastického chirurga. Ten je ochotný operovať iba pod podmienkou, že ho Hawkeye a Trapper zoznámia s nejakou sestrou. Predhodia mu teda sestru prezývanú Barakuda. Hlavný problém však je, aby se to nedozvedeli Frank a Margaret...

programme.title: Alf II (18)
programme.desc: Brian privedie domov psa, o ktorom tvrdí, že ho sledoval celú cestu domov zo školy. Tannerovci sa rozhodnú psa ponechať doma do chvíle, kým sa o neho prihlási skutočný majiteľ. Vyvesia v okolí plagáty a čakajú. Prvý záujemca o sučku Alfínu, ako ju Tannerovci pomenovali, očividne nie je pravý, teda si zviera neodvedie. Alf však začína na psa žiarliť a poslednou kvapkou je, keď si Alfína ľahne do mimozemšťanovho pelechu. Čoskoro si pre sučku príde jej pravá majiteľka, malé dievčatko, avšak Alfína je nezvestná. Je jasné, že v tom má prsty žiarlivý Alf...

programme.title: Alf II (19)
programme.desc: Brian prichádza domov a je zbitý od chlapca z ulice. Doma dostáva kázanie, že biť sa nesmie, hoci je mu poľahčujúcou okolnosťou, že obraňoval svoju matku. Na ďalší deň sa však situácia opakuje a to už toho má Alf práve dosť. Zavolá otcovi agresívneho chlapca, pánovi Duncanovi, a vydávajúc sa za Willieho, núti ho prísť sa ospravedlniť. Návšteva má však úplne iný priebeh. Otec je rozhorčený a odhodlaný sa s pánom Tannerom pobiť.

programme.title: Alf II (20)
programme.desc: Willieho povýšenie v zamestnaní znamená presun do San Diega, čo zvyšok rodiny aj Alf desí. Alf si je vedomý toho, že nová práca Willieho neteší, a tak plánuje, ako sťahovaniu zabrániť.

programme.title: Alf II (21)
programme.desc: Nikto netuší, ako si vysvetliť asociálne správanie Alfovho najnovšieho zásielkového prírastku - bruchomluveckej figuríny menom Paul. Ako sa Alf zdokonaľuje v imitovaní hlasu, Paul sa stáva manipulatívnejším.

programme.title: M*A*S*H II (18)
programme.desc: Hawkeye a Trapper sa rozhodnú pomôcť vojakovi, ktorý trpí pre svoj obrovský nos. Pozvú do tábora Hawkeyeho priateľa - plastického chirurga. Ten je ochotný operovať iba pod podmienkou, že ho Hawkeye a Trapper zoznámia s nejakou sestrou. Predhodia mu teda sestru prezývanú Barakuda. Hlavný problém však je, aby se to nedozvedeli Frank a Margaret...

programme.title: To zvládneme, amigo
programme.desc: Malý chlapec a pištoľník zachránia tuláka pred istou smrťou obesením. Prichádza však smutná správa – chlapcov strýko umiera. Skôr než naposledy vydýchne, požiada tuláka, aby sa postaral o jeho synovca. A predovšetkým, aby získal dedičstvo, ktoré mu právom patrí. Ako sa ukáže, strýkovo bohatstvo je naozaj veľké… Úprimný malý chlapec a pištoľník zachránia tuláka pred obesením. Chlapcov strýko umiera a odkáže mu dom a suchú, neúrodnú pôdu. Pred smrťou prinúti tuláka sľúbiť, že sa postará o to, aby chlapec svoje dedičstvo skutočne získal. Medzitým pištoľník prinúti tuláka, aby sa oženil s jeho dcérou, s ktorou mal kedysi pomer. Pištoľník a tulák sa dostanú do série hádok a prestreliek, až napokon dorazia do mesta a zistia, že chlapcovo dedičstvo nie je také bezcenné, ako sa na prvý pohľad zdalo.

programme.title: Anderov rebrinák
programme.desc: Zábavná šou známeho ľudového zabávača Andera z Košíc, vlastným menom Jána Pisančina. V obľúbenej zábavnej relácii sa môžete tešiť nielen na kvalitnú ľudovú hudbu, no predovšetkým na množstvo nezabudnuteľných vtipov sympatického košického ľudového zabávača Andera v neodmysliteľnej flanelovej košeli, saku a svojskom širáku, ktoré prednáša s nezameniteľným východniarskym prízvukom. Divákom však nepochybne najviac utkveli v pamäti jeho nesmrteľné historky „zo života“, ktorých hlavnými hrdinami sú okrem samotného zabávača Andera aj jeho najlepší kamarát Piťo a manželka Erža!

programme.title: Dereš
programme.desc: Politicko-satirická zábavná show Olivera Andrásyho a Eleny Vacvalovej, plná politickej satiry, kultivovaného humoru a brilantných scén obľúbenej moderátorskej dvojice na výsostne aktuálne politické témy. Scenár dopĺňajú vtipné odpovede humoristov Jána Snopka, Jána Grexu a Zdena Luknára, ako aj vystúpenia imitátorskej dvojice Kajzer-Meluš.

programme.title: Kontrola na hranicích Nový Zéland VI (1)
programme.desc: Lidské zavazadlo. Dokument N. Zél. (2014). V Queenstownu vstoupí na Nový Zéland muž s temnou minulostí, úředníci Biosecurity mají plné ruce práce se spoustou masa a na letišti v Aucklandu přistane pašerák drog... Chytí ho celníci?

programme.title: Kontrola na hranicích Nový Zéland VI (2)
programme.desc: Seriál sleduje celníky a ministerské úředníky Nového Zélandu, kteří chrání hranice. Celníci zadržují léky, falešné pasy a podvodníky, úředníci zvířecí škůdce a exotická zvířata.

programme.title: Pohraniční stráž USA - Mosty II (10)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2019). V podivném vozidle je nalezeno mnoho krabic s drogami. Špičkový kódovací systém v pick-upu může skrývat drogy, takže celníci mají co dělat.

programme.title: Neviditelné zlo VIII (19)
programme.desc: Anděl smrti. Dokument USA (2023). V nemocnici v texaském Tyleru začnou v roce 2017 na jednotce intenzivní péče záhadně umírat pacienti. Počet mrtvých roste a detektivové se při pátrání po monstru spoléhají na záznamy z bezpečnostních kamer.

programme.title: Vraždy, které šokovaly XXIX (8)
programme.desc: Francine Stepp. Dokument USA (2021). Dospívající dívka z Oklahomy najde doma své rodiče zavražděné. Detektivové objeví podivné fotografie a pomocí nových technologií odhalí dynamické duo, které stojí za tímto ohavným zločinem.

programme.title: Vězení u protinožců (8)
programme.desc: Dokument Austr. (2021). Statistiky se nečtou dobře: 42 procent vězňů se vrátí za mříže během prvních dvou let. Vězni dostávají po příchodu do věznice všechny šance, ale cesta k vykoupení není snadná.

programme.title: Pohraniční stráž USA - Mosty III (1)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2021). Celníci zachytí arzenál zbraní pašovaných do Mexika, které kartely používají při svých krutých válkách. A v mrazáku objeví zásilku fentanylu.

programme.title: Zrod masového vraha II (10)
programme.desc: Todd Lee. Dokument USA (2024). Derrick Todd Lee byl okouzlující muž, který se ale posléze proměnil ve smrtícího predátora. Zaměřoval se na ženy v jejich domovech v jihovýchodní Louisianě a zanechával za sebou nevýslovné násilí.

programme.title: Vražedné aféry (4)
programme.desc: Příběhy zhrzených milenců, které jejich touha vedla až k vraždě. Každá epizoda vypráví jeden nový případ a představuje vraždy podnícené nevěrou a podvodem.

programme.title: Smrtící touha III (8)
programme.desc: Vysoce riskantní vražda. Dokument USA (2020). Pár v důchodu je nalezen ubit brutálně k smrti v jejich domě, ale detektivové brzy zjistí, že co se odehraje ve Vegas, nemusí zůstat vždy ve Vegas, a honí odporného vraha.

programme.title: Vražda: Čas usmrcení (8)
programme.desc: Nepříčetný a smrtící. Dokumentární seriál VB (2017). Na bohatém předměstí Atlanty je po návratu ze školy domů osmnáctkrát pobodán pětiletý chlapec - a v ložnici je objeveno mrtvé tělo jeho matky.

programme.title: Vraždy, které šokovaly XXIX (24)
programme.desc: Delma Troy. Dokument USA (2021). Všechny stopy vedou do slepé uličky poté, co je bývalá filmová hvězda nalezena zastřelená ve svém vlastním domě. Vyšetřovatelé zjistí, že toto drama má více zvratů, než jakýkoli hollywoodský film.

programme.title: Neviditelné zlo VIII (15)
programme.desc: Jak se může podařit vyřešit zločin pomocí bezpečnostních kamer? Tento seriál nabídne skutečné záběry a dramatické rekonstrukce v kombinaci se svědectvími z první ruky jak od policistů, tak svědků a rodin.

programme.title: Vězení u protinožců (8)
programme.desc: Dokument Austr. (2021). Statistiky se nečtou dobře: 42 procent vězňů se vrátí za mříže během prvních dvou let. Vězni dostávají po příchodu do věznice všechny šance, ale cesta k vykoupení není snadná.

programme.title: Pohraniční stráž USA - Mosty II (10)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2019). V podivném vozidle je nalezeno mnoho krabic s drogami. Špičkový kódovací systém v pick-upu může skrývat drogy, takže celníci mají co dělat.

programme.title: Vraždy, které šokovaly XXIX (4)
programme.desc: Samantha Wohlford. Dokument USA (2021). Jednoho otce z Texasu unesou a následně je nalezen zavražděný. Vyšetřovatelé z okresu Titus County sledují stopy z mobilního telefonu a historie internetu, aby odhalili mistrovské spiknutí.

programme.title: Smrtící touha III (8)
programme.desc: Vysoce riskantní vražda. Dokument USA (2020). Pár v důchodu je nalezen ubit brutálně k smrti v jejich domě, ale detektivové brzy zjistí, že co se odehraje ve Vegas, nemusí zůstat vždy ve Vegas, a honí odporného vraha.

programme.title: Život se sériovým vrahem II (5)
programme.desc: Shawn Grate. Dokument USA (2022). Záchranná mise se děsivě zvrtne. Během výslechu vrah prozradí místo, kde se nacházejí další těla. Jeho nevlastní sestra promluví o dysfunkčním dětství, které vytvořilo sériového vraha.

programme.title: O. J. Simpson - krev, lži a vražda (2)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2022). Tom Lange si povídá s Kato Kaelinem, přítelem Nicole Brown Simpsonové, a řidičem limuzíny O. J. Simpsona Allanem Parkem, aby navodili scénu z vražedné noci a probrali pocity ohledně vražd.

programme.title: Klaun a Candyman (4)
programme.desc: V 70. letech 20. století se v Severní Americe pohřešovaly tisíce dospívajících chlapců. Některé z nich brutálně zavraždili dva sérioví vrazi, tzv. Klaun zabiják John Wayne Gacy a „Candyman" Dean Corll.

programme.title: Život se sériovým vrahem II (5)
programme.desc: Shawn Grate. Dokument USA (2022). Záchranná mise se děsivě zvrtne. Během výslechu vrah prozradí místo, kde se nacházejí další těla. Jeho nevlastní sestra promluví o dysfunkčním dětství, které vytvořilo sériového vraha.

programme.title: Případy vražd III (1)
programme.desc: Žhářství a vraždy. Dokument USA (2022). Hasiči se zoufale snaží zachránit mladou rodinu z hořících plamenů, ale záchrana přišla příliš pozdě. Policie poté zjistí, že oheň nevznikl náhodou, ale šlo o žhářství.

programme.title: Pohraniční stráž USA - Mosty III (10)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2021). Ve reproduktoru v nákladním autě je nalezen pervitin. Mexický chlapec je vyslýchán poté, co se přihlásil k americkému občanství. A jedna dívka je přistižena při pašování tramadolu.

programme.title: Vražda: Čas usmrcení (4)
programme.desc: Tento seriál sleduje vyšetřovatele, jak skládají události, ke kterým došlo v posledních 24 hodinách života oběti, v kritickém okně, které je klíčem k odhalení motivů a nalezení pachatele

programme.title: Vrah v mé rodině (2)
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez. Dokument VB (2018). Richard Ramirez znásilnil a mučil více než 25 obětí a přes tucet jich zabil. Jeho neteř o něm povypráví ze svého pohledu a prozradí, jak jeho hrůzné zločiny ovlivnily její rodinu.

programme.title: Svého vraha znáš (15)
programme.desc: Navzdory všeobecnému mínění je většina lidí zavražděna někým, koho znají, než náhodným psychopatem. Tato série představí příběhy zrady ze strany vrahů, které lidé znali.

programme.title: Svého vraha znáš (16)
programme.desc: Navzdory všeobecnému mínění je většina lidí zavražděna někým, koho znají, než náhodným psychopatem. Tato série představí příběhy zrady ze strany vrahů, které lidé znali.

programme.title: Přežili jsme útok sériového vraha (8)
programme.desc: Vrah z tajného seznamu. Dokumentární seriál USA (2021). V listopadu 2011 sedí na zadním sedadle starého buicku 48letý Scott Davis. Myslí si, že ho vezou na brigádu jakožto správce farmy. Tuhle práci si totiž našel na tajném internetovém seznamu Craigslistu. Ale je to vražedná past.

programme.title: Přežili jsme útok sériového vraha (10)
programme.desc: Škrtič z Clevelandu. Dokumentární seriál USA (2021). V září 2008 nabídne Anthony Sowell Vanesse Gayové, že si u něho doma dají pití a drogy. Dívka netuší, že jde do domu, kde je ukryto a pohřbeno 11 předchozích obětí.

programme.title: Zrod masového vraha II (8)
programme.desc: William Davis. Dokument USA (2024). Detektivové prohlížejí záběry z bezpečnostních kamer, aby zabránili další tragédii. Snaží se totiž vyřešit řadu záhadných úmrtí na jednotce intenzivní péče v nemocnici Tyler v Texasu.

programme.title: Zrod masového vraha II (9)
programme.desc: Gary Hilton. Dokument USA (2024). Gary Michael Hilton provedl několik brutálních vražd turistů při cestě přes odlehlé Apalačské hory. Statečnost a vůle přežít u posledního cíle nakonec pomohly k jeho zatčení.

programme.title: Zrod masového vraha II (10)
programme.desc: Todd Lee. Dokument USA (2024). Derrick Todd Lee byl okouzlující muž, který se ale posléze proměnil ve smrtícího predátora. Zaměřoval se na ženy v jejich domovech v jihovýchodní Louisianě a zanechával za sebou nevýslovné násilí.

programme.title: Vrah v mé rodině (1)
programme.desc: Fred West. Dokument VB (2018). Fred a Rose Westovi spáchali během dvou desetiletí nejméně tucet hrůzných vražd. Fredův bratr a neteř prozradí, jak jeho odporné zločiny ovlivnily jejich rodinu.

programme.title: Vrah v mé rodině (2)
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez. Dokument VB (2018). Richard Ramirez znásilnil a mučil více než 25 obětí a přes tucet jich zabil. Jeho neteř o něm povypráví ze svého pohledu a prozradí, jak jeho hrůzné zločiny ovlivnily její rodinu.

programme.title: Vraždy, které šokovaly XXIX (6)
programme.desc: Karen Clowers. Dokument USA (2021). Manželka vietnamského veterána je nalezena mrtvá na parkovišti u dálnice. Detektivové z Missouri se snaží dopadnout strůjce zvráceného plánu v provedení nájemného vraha.

programme.title: Vraždy, které šokovaly XXIX (7)
programme.desc: Mary Jacoby. Dokument USA (2021). Po vraždě majitele vrakoviště musejí detektivové z Texasu prošetřit každou stopu, aby odhalili pravdu, jež se skrývá za lží, zradou a zlomeným srdcem.

programme.title: Vraždy, které šokovaly XXIX (8)
programme.desc: Francine Stepp. Dokument USA (2021). Dospívající dívka z Oklahomy najde doma své rodiče zavražděné. Detektivové objeví podivné fotografie a pomocí nových technologií odhalí dynamické duo, které stojí za tímto ohavným zločinem.

programme.title: Vraždy, které šokovaly XXIX (9)
programme.desc: Deborah Rudibaugh. Dokument USA (2021). Když zmizí jeden mladý rančer z Colorada, jeho přátelé mají podezření, které přiměje místní policii pátrat po pravdě skryté pod klidným povrchem jeho ranče.

programme.title: Vraždy, které šokovaly XXIX (10)
programme.desc: Rachel Kozloff. Dokument USA (2021). Oblíbený motorkář je nalezen zastřelený ve svém bytě v Pensylvánii. Detektivové sledují konkurenční motorkářské kluby i opovržené milenky, aby odhalili pravdu.

programme.title: Pohraniční stráž USA - Mosty III (1)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2021). Celníci zachytí arzenál zbraní pašovaných do Mexika, které kartely používají při svých krutých válkách. A v mrazáku objeví zásilku fentanylu.

programme.title: Pohraniční stráž USA - Mosty III (2)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2021). Policisté zjistí, že palivové nádrže kamionu jsou plné tekutého amfetaminu. Tři muži ve stejném oblečení vzbudí podezření. A jeden muž je přistižen při pašování vzácných plazů.

programme.title: Pohraniční stráž USA - Mosty III (3)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2021). Žena je podezřelá z pašování cizího dítěte přes hranice. V zásilce mrkve jsou nalezeny ukryté drogy. A na základě dřívějšího udání je dopaden pašerák pilulek.

programme.title: Pohraniční stráž USA - Mosty III (4)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2021). Je vyslýchán muž cestující se dvěma dětmi, které nejsou jeho. Další cestující je přistižen při pašování hotovosti. A celníci také najdou drogy na valníku nákladního automobilu.

programme.title: Pohraniční stráž USA - Mosty III (5)
programme.desc: Dokument USA (2021). Policisté objeví zásilky UPS, které byly obloženy drogami. Na mostě Gateway to the Americas Bridge je zadržen čtrnáctiletý uprchlík. A jedna matka je přistižena při pokusu o pašování marihuany.

programme.title: Život v ohrožení - Příběh Marcely Borgesové
Spravedlnost podle kultu (4)
programme.desc: Pastorka Tiffanie. Dokument USA (2022). Kult pastorky Tiffanie v New Yorku ubil Lucase Leonarda k smrti. Po svědectví jeho bratra bylo zatčeno devět lidí, včetně rodičů, Tiffanie dostala 12 let.

programme.title: Spravedlnost podle kultu (5)
programme.desc: Tato série zkoumá moc vůdců zločineckých kultů a vyšetřování, která je nakonec přivedla před soud. Od obchodování s lidmi za účelem vynucené prostituce až po polygamii a dokonce i vraždy.

programme.title: Spravedlnost podle kultu (6)
programme.desc: Dr. Láska a Nuwaubijané. Dokument USA (2022). Dwight York (Dr. Láska) postavil poblíž Atlanty egyptský komplex, kde zneužíval své stoupence. Jeho syn to nahlásil úřadům a Dwight dostal 125 let ve federální věznici s maximální ostrahou.

programme.title: Neviditelné zlo VIII (2)
programme.desc: Jak se může podařit vyřešit zločin pomocí bezpečnostních kamer? Tento seriál nabídne skutečné záběry a dramatické rekonstrukce v kombinaci se svědectvími z první ruky jak od policistů, tak svědků a rodin.

programme.title: Neviditelné zlo VIII (3)
programme.desc: Jak se může podařit vyřešit zločin pomocí bezpečnostních kamer? Tento seriál nabídne skutečné záběry a dramatické rekonstrukce v kombinaci se svědectvími z první ruky jak od policistů, tak svědků a rodin.

programme.title: Neviditelné zlo VIII (4)

Josef Klíma: Jak jsem přežil devadesátky
programme.desc: Drogy Josef Klíma ve svém novém pořadu JAK JSEM PŘEŽIL DEVADESÁTKY vypráví o tom, jak dobrodružné a často i nebezpečné tehdy bylo dělat novináře. O tajných schůzkách s mafiány, o rozhovorech s lidmi, jako byli Ivan Jonák, orličtí vrazi, Radovan Krejčíř a další. I o tom, jak se měnilo české podsvětí. Osobní zpověď reportéra, který se stal také symbolem této divoké doby. Ovšem na opačné straně než zločinci.

programme.title: Josef Klíma: Jak jsem přežil devadesátky
programme.desc: Lihové mafie Josef Klíma ve svém novém pořadu JAK JSEM PŘEŽIL DEVADESÁTKY vypráví o tom, jak dobrodružné a často i nebezpečné tehdy bylo dělat novináře. programme.title: Most III (8)
programme.desc: Švédsko-dánský seriál Most se stal mezinárodním hitem a zařadil se mezi špičku celosvětové seriálové produkce. Napjatě očekávaná třetí série, premiérově uvedená ve Skandinávii během podzimu 2015, opět přichází se stejným konceptem. Dvojice odlišných vyšetřovatelů ze zemí propojených titulním mostem přes úžinu Öresund společně řeší spletitý případ zasahující do jurisdikcí Švédska i Dánska. Také tentokrát vše začíná činy, které se vztahují k aktuálním společenským tématům a globálním otázkám, konkrétně k maximálně inkluzivní společnosti. Tato švédská společensko-politická linie, kterou konzervativní jedinci vidí jako do extrému dohnanou politickou korektnost, zahrnuje přijímání minorit i potlačování omezujících stereotypů a diskriminace, ať už týkajících se rasy, vyznání, orientace či genderu. Skrze motivy vážící se k fenoménům, jako jsou genderově neutrální školky či sňatky gayů, otevírá téma polarizované společnosti, kde se konzervativní tábor stává menšinou, což vede k jeho radikalizaci. Ale podobně jako v předchozích dvou sériích vyšetřování odhaluje, že hlavním hybatelem jsou vždy jednotlivci se zcela osobními motivacemi, kteří aktuální témata i jejich zanícené zastánce či odpůrce využívají jako pouhé nástroje k dosažení svých cílů. Pro fanoušky seriálu zásadní otázku představovalo, jak se tvůrci vypořádají s vývojem hlavních postav na konci druhé série. Jelikož představitel Martina Rohdeho, Kim Bodina, svou účast na seriálu (přinejmenším dočasně) ukončil, musela Saga Norénová dostat nový dánský protipól, ale také se stala ústřední osobou. Třetí série se proto zaměřuje na její vztah s kolegy i rodinou, se kterou zpřetrhala vazby po smrti sestry. Soukromé i pracovní peripetie ji navíc nutí čelit tomu, co ji nejvíce vyvádí z míry a s čím jediným si neví rady – jejími vlastními emocemi.

programme.title: Exkluziv!
programme.desc: Nahlédněte spolu s námi do světa hvězd a jejich nejbližších

programme.title: Hvězdy na cestách
programme.desc: Life-stylový magazín, ve kterém představíme vybraná města specifickým způsobem, novou a zábavnější formou, by měl být průvodcovskou příručkou pro turisty, kteří chtějí cestovat po vlastní ose. Evropskými metropolemi nás vždy provede několik populárních osobnosti, které mají k danému místu osobní vztah. Divákům představíme například luxusní, ale i nejlevnější hotely a restaurace, správné ulice, kde se obléknou podle poslední módy, a také oblíbené kavárny známých světových celebrit.

programme.title: Politická střelnice
programme.desc: Satirický pořad Zuzany Bubílkové.

programme.title: Doktorka Kellerová (2)
programme.desc: Seriál ČR (2016). Doktorka Lýdie Kellerová začíná nový život v Praze. Změnila pracovní místo, otevřela si soukromou psychiatrickou ordinaci a věnuje se také další své specializaci, soudnímu znalectví. A právě tento obor ji přivádí na nová místa a mezi nové lidi. Řeší případy, které mohou být, nebo jsou na hranici trestního činu.

programme.title: Noha 22 (11)
programme.desc: Mouchovi, Kouřilovi a Nepilovi se nelíbí, že pacientky chodí po nemocnici nedostatečně upravené a debatují o tom, jak by se to mělo vyřešit. Doporučují například zavedení přehlídek krásy. Zabývají se i celkově nepříznivou situaci v zařízení a docházejí k přesvědčení, že nevraživost mezi pacienty, nedostatečné vytápění pokojů, protekci a korupci v nemocnici může vyřešit pouze zavedení vojenského pořádku a uplatňování práva silnějšího. Detailně pak probírají detaily takového uspořádání. Den končí návštěvou příbuzných, a tak starosti o chod nemocnice z pacientů dočasně spadnou.

Mush-Mush And The Mushables II
programme.desc: Mush-Mush and the Mushables follows the comedy adventures of the Mushable community as together they put the fun back into fungi! As pocket-sized Guardians of the Forest, each Mushable has a special gift; while Mush-Mush can communicate with nature, Lilit shines bright like the light and Chep has an impressive memory. As they get to know thier talents and their limits, the Mushables find there is still a lot to discover about growing up! A fun journey of self-discovery, exciting outdoor adventure and mush mush more!

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Magic Marker. After the Docs constantly fail to catch Lamput with the power of science and technology, they come across an unlikely source to help them with their troubles - Magic! A witch offers them a magic marker that gives them any supernatural powers they draw on their skin. Lamput must now escape and Skinny with their new magical power!

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Theatre Night. It's a night out at the theatre for the Docs but when they spot Lamput in the front row, they decide to give up their night of culture for a night of capture! Lamput escapes backstage where he morphs from scenery into props, then into costume and eventually ends up on stage! The Docs make chase, and end up becoming part of the performance too, much to the Directors dismay. Can the show go on? Or will it be a total flop?

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Sleepwalking. Specs will never learn about watching horror movies before bed. He can never sleep afterwards. He jumps at every strange noise - including the ones Skinny's making downstairs, as he blends up a smoothie IN HIS SLEEP.

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Some Kind Of Magic. The Docs spot Lamput in the audience of a magic show and try to catch him. The chase takes them backstage where Lamput evades the Docs with the help of different magic contraptions until Specs and Skinny unknowingly ends up on stage. They become reluctant assistants to the Magician who is about to perform some death-defying tricks – with the help of the Docs!

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: The Tribe. While trying to escape from the Docs, Lamput stumbles into a hole in the ground, which leads in an underground civilization with a large tribe in it! Lamput gets misunderstood as the Chosen One according to the tribe’s prophecy. The tribe hails Lamput as the prophet and this proves to be a huge challenge for the Docs to catch Lamput, now that Lamput is surrounded by worshippers and guards at all times!

programme.title: SuperThings: Rivals of Kaboom - Kazoom Power
programme.desc: The Eyes Of A Villain. During training at the Hero Base, the SuperThings mistake Kid Fury for a villain because of his yellow eyes.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: In a vast natural reserve lost in the middle of the untamed wilderness, there is a small haven of human civilization: the forest ranger's house. Because he is (from his point of view) the most evolved animal on earth, the bear Grizzy feels it's only natural that the ranger's house becomes his territory as soon as its owner is away. No other animal dares to contest this 'bear's privilege,' except the most inoffensive, stupid and ridiculous mammal family that exists: the Lemmings - who also move into the house as soon as the ranger is gone. Grizzy and the Lemmings lead a merciless battle over the house in an atmosphere of total madness, where the two adversaries constantly try to outdo each other with nasty tricks!

programme.title: Batwheels II
programme.desc: Batwheels, a preschool animated action-adventure comedy series starring the most heroic and iconic vehicles from the DC universe. They are a team of incredible crimefighters who have banded together to oppose evil, combat crime and clean up the streets of Gotham City. They are...okay, they're NOT Batman and Robin. They're the Batwheels - an awesome group of sentient super-powered crime-fighting vehicles defending Gotham City alongside Batman, Robin, Batgirl and a host of DC Super Heroes. Having just been created by the Batcomputer, our heroes are essentially kids with little to no life experience. Led by Bam (The Batmobile), the Batwheels - Bibi (The Batgirl Cycle), Red (The Redbird), Jett (The Batwing) and Buff (The Bat Truck) - must navigate the growing pains of being a newly formed super team as well as the growing pains that come with just being a kid.

programme.title: Ben 10 II
programme.desc: While on a seemingly endless summer vacation with his Grandpa Max and Cousin Gwen, Ben Tennyson discovers an alien watch: the Omnitrix. This device gives Ben the ability to transform into any one of ten spectacular and powerful aliens! Ben, Gwen and Max travel the country in their motor home affectionately known as the Rust Bucket seeing the sights, stumbling into adventures and beating down would-be villains while generally having a blast!

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: Screama Donna. To solve the mystery of a ghostly performer haunting her former venue, the Gang has to pretend to be a rock band themselves! But can they solve the case before Velma has to actually get on stage and sing?

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: If You Can't Scooby-Doo the Time Don't Scooby-Doo the Crime. Fred is excited to visit The Vault - a high security prison from which no convict has ever escaped. But when the ghost of Stealing Stan (JOHN DiMAGGIO), an inmate who always claimed to be innocent, terrorizes the prison, Fred has to solve the mystery and rethink his stance on criminal justice!

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean in Love. He’s got her record, the poster and the T-shirt, so when Mr. Bean’s heart-throb, Roxy, is set to sing in concert at the London Palladium, he sets his sights on the only thing that will make his life complete: her signature in his autograph book. A difficult feat but can love prevail?

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series III
programme.desc: Mr Bean returns for a third series of his animated adventures. Featuring in 26 brand new episodes. This series follows Mr Bean, his best friend Teddy and his long-suffering landlady Mrs Wicket as we witness more of the mishaps that surround Mr Bean's daily life. Mr Bean becomes obsessed with computer gaming, prevents Mrs. Wicket from selling her house, builds his own caravan, rescues a football from a haunted house and finds himself in many other hilarious escapades. All voiced by Rowan Atkinson.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: Superfied. Dr. Bigby creates cookies that can give animals superpowers. Jerry and Napoleon sneak some cookies, and they have fun terrorizing Tom, an alley cat who has broken in to eat them. The tables are turned when Tom gets his hands on the cookies.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: What a Pain. After a particularly destructive chase, Tom and Spike have to go to the vet and Ginger hires an exterminator to take care of Jerry and Tuffy once and for all. Spike and Tom try to escape the vet only to get even more hurt, and Jerry and Tuffy make the exterminator's life miserable.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: Hop To It! Tom and Jerry have to go retrieve an ingredient for the witches' spell before sundown. Tom sees Princess Toodles and quickly forgets the mission. He competes with Butch in three trials to win over Toodles. Jerry struggles to keep them on track and to help Tom out with the competition.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: For the Love of Ruggles. Tom impulsively kicks Spike's beloved chew toy Ruggles over the fence and has to go get it back when he sees how heartbroken Spike becomes. Things get hard when Ruggles is adopted by an imaginative little girl and Tom has to steal him back.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Pizza Bean. Mr Bean orders a takeaway pizza but when it arrives he feels let down by the size of it. So he sets out to bake his own unique Teddy shaped pizzas. Under the name Pizza Bean his pizzas become extremely popular and very soon business in booming. As a result rival pizza producer Don Crustyoni sees his profits plummeting and decides to make Mr Bean an offer he can’t refuse.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: The Photograph. Mr Bean is not allowed to fly off on holiday as his passport has no photograph. After failing to get one from a photo booth he tries numerous other ways to get his photo taken including photobombing a tourist’s snap. None of these work but after Bean is arrested maybe the police can assist him. Say cheese!

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Dancing Bean. Mr Bean wants to impress Irma by entering them both into a dance competition at the local park. But his tango is terrible and his rumba ridiculous so he enrols for lessons at a local dance school. After an unsuccessful class at the dance studio and a trip to the library to teach himself Mr Bean has lost track of time. He needs to make it up to a disgruntled Irma but will his homemade effort ‘win’ her over.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Bean in Love. He’s got her record, the poster and the T-shirt, so when Mr. Bean’s heart-throb, Roxy, is set to sing in concert at the London Palladium, he sets his sights on the only thing that will make his life complete: her signature in his autograph book. A difficult feat but can love prevail?

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Double Trouble. Mr. Bean is over the moon when he meets Mr. Pod because both men have so much in common; same shirt, jacket, trousers and underpants. And to top it all, Pod is Bean’s spitting image! Bean falls to Earth with a bump, though, when his girlfriend, Irma Gobb, finds Mr. Pod much better looking than him.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Bean Shopping. Mr Bean manages to get himself locked in a department store overnight while spending too long trying on clothes. Bean takes advantage of the situation having fun in the various departments. But when he discovers a robbery taking place the fun and games stop as the desperate burglar chases Bean from floor to floor and all around the store.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series III
programme.desc: Mr Bean returns for a third series of his animated adventures. Featuring in 26 brand new episodes. This series follows Mr Bean, his best friend Teddy and his long-suffering landlady Mrs Wicket as we witness more of the mishaps that surround Mr Bean's daily life. Mr Bean becomes obsessed with computer gaming, prevents Mrs. Wicket from selling her house, builds his own caravan, rescues a football from a haunted house and finds himself in many other hilarious escapades. All voiced by Rowan Atkinson.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series III
programme.desc: Mr Bean returns for a third series of his animated adventures. Featuring in 26 brand new episodes. This series follows Mr Bean, his best friend Teddy and his long-suffering landlady Mrs Wicket as we witness more of the mishaps that surround Mr Bean's daily life. Mr Bean becomes obsessed with computer gaming, prevents Mrs. Wicket from selling her house, builds his own caravan, rescues a football from a haunted house and finds himself in many other hilarious escapades. All voiced by Rowan Atkinson.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series III
programme.desc: Mr Bean returns for a third series of his animated adventures. Featuring in 26 brand new episodes. This series follows Mr Bean, his best friend Teddy and his long-suffering landlady Mrs Wicket as we witness more of the mishaps that surround Mr Bean's daily life. Mr Bean becomes obsessed with computer gaming, prevents Mrs. Wicket from selling her house, builds his own caravan, rescues a football from a haunted house and finds himself in many other hilarious escapades. All voiced by Rowan Atkinson.

programme.title: Krypto Saves the Day!
programme.desc: Package Pandemonium. Krypto smells something special in a holiday package, and in his eagerness to grab the gift he makes a mess of Metropolis’s festivities.

programme.title: Krypto Saves the Day!
programme.desc: Coastal Catastrophe. A fun day at the beach goes sideways when some sneaky foes get between Krypto and his hot dog.

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: The House Guest. After a beautiful start to a beautiful day, a sudden storm cuts the fun short and the Docs have to go home. Lamput accidentally gets taken home with them. As always, Lamput makes himself at home. No one is the wiser until the next morning. It’s time for Skinny and Specs to go into full on detective mode and to find out who or what is in their house. Can Lamput make a run for it before they find him?

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Lamput is a gooey orange nutcase that has escaped from the asylum! Two Docs are out to get him, but the problem is they can never catch him becasue Lamput is a master of disguise!

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Rock Concert. “Chasing Lamput” turns out to be the ultimate backstage pass; the Docs pursue the orange blob through the dressing room and directly onto the stage of a gigantic stadium rock concert. The crowd goes wild. Which raises questions about their taste in music, to be honest; Skinny plays guitar like he’s gotten himself tangled in the strings (which he has), and Specs’ drumming, well, it’s certainly got passion. No taste, skill or rhythm, but certainly passion. The stage ends up in tatters by the time the actual band arrives. Those Docs are a hard act to follow.

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: The Desert Years. The Docs pursue Lamput across a vast desert. Things go wrong and all three end up stranded with no way to call for help. Stuck with each other, the trio roam the desert as days turn into years and the Docs grow old. One day, they find a map that leads to a Fountain of Youth and a way out of the desert, but can they survive the journey across the harsh, sand sea?

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Batwheels, a preschool animated action-adventure comedy series starring the most heroic and iconic vehicles from the DC universe. They are a team of incredible crimefighters who have banded together to oppose evil, combat crime and clean up the streets of Gotham City. They are...okay, they're NOT Batman and Robin. They're the Batwheels - an awesome group of sentient super-powered crime-fighting vehicles defending Gotham City alongside Batman, Robin, Batgirl and a host of DC Super Heroes. Having just been created by the Batcomputer, our heroes are essentially kids with little to no life experience. Led by Bam (The Batmobile), the Batwheels - Bibi (The Batgirl Cycle), Red (The Redbird), Jett (The Batwing) and Buff (The Bat Truck) - must navigate the growing pains of being a newly formed super team as well as the growing pains that come with just being a kid.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Batwheels, a preschool animated action-adventure comedy series starring the most heroic and iconic vehicles from the DC universe. They are a team of incredible crimefighters who have banded together to oppose evil, combat crime and clean up the streets of Gotham City. They are...okay, they're NOT Batman and Robin. They're the Batwheels - an awesome group of sentient super-powered crime-fighting vehicles defending Gotham City alongside Batman, Robin, Batgirl and a host of DC Super Heroes. Having just been created by the Batcomputer, our heroes are essentially kids with little to no life experience. Led by Bam (The Batmobile), the Batwheels - Bibi (The Batgirl Cycle), Red (The Redbird), Jett (The Batwing) and Buff (The Bat Truck) - must navigate the growing pains of being a newly formed super team as well as the growing pains that come with just being a kid.

programme.title: Ben 10 II
programme.desc: While on a seemingly endless summer vacation with his Grandpa Max and Cousin Gwen, Ben Tennyson discovers an alien watch: the Omnitrix. This device gives Ben the ability to transform into any one of ten spectacular and powerful aliens! Ben, Gwen and Max travel the country in their motor home affectionately known as the Rust Bucket seeing the sights, stumbling into adventures and beating down would-be villains while generally having a blast!

programme.title: Ben 10 II
programme.desc: While on a seemingly endless summer vacation with his Grandpa Max and Cousin Gwen, Ben Tennyson discovers an alien watch: the Omnitrix. This device gives Ben the ability to transform into any one of ten spectacular and powerful aliens! Ben, Gwen and Max travel the country in their motor home affectionately known as the Rust Bucket seeing the sights, stumbling into adventures and beating down would-be villains while generally having a blast!

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo! II
programme.desc: Worst in Show. After a Giant Houndbeast attacks an elite dog show, the gang goes undercover and enters Scooby in the show in order to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo! II
programme.desc: Mysteries on the Disorient Express. Unhappy about a mystery-free, three-day, cross-country train trip with the gang, Fred is pleasantly surprised to discover a monster mystery on board. He's less pleasantly surprised however, when that mystery is interrupted by a second mystery, then a third, then a fourth…

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Age Remote. The Docs prove their inventing skills by coming up with an age-altering time-ray. This breakthrough could change the world. If they used it for something other than chasing Lamput. Obsessed much, fellas? Wildly shooting their time-ray off in public causes a not-unsurprising amount of chaos, until the local law enforcement gets caught in the cross-fire. Looks like the Specs and Skinny are gonna be in jail till they get old the normal way.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Missing Teddy. Whilst browsing the supermarket for lovely grub, Mr. Bean’s life-long pal, Teddy, is kidnapped. Bean tracks down the nasty men responsible and finds that Teddy is not their only captive. Mr. Bean rescues a hundred teddy bears once their ears are put through an industrial sewing machine.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Bean Phone. Mr Bean is keen to own a brand new smart phone when he discovers all the wonderful things it can do. But after a trip to the mobile phone shop he is horrified at how much they cost and decides to build his own one. Bean’s phone may be bulky but it comes with a whole range of built in gadgets especially useful during a race to The Tower of London.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Hotel Bean. A confused Japanese tourist couple mistake Mr Bean’s house for a hotel and because of the language barrier it is difficult to explain otherwise. When the hapless holidaymakers offer to pay to stay Mr Bean and Mrs Wicket see a way of making some money and pretend their house is indeed a hotel. But it’s not long before the tourists start to smell a fish.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Jurassic Bean. Mr Bean is on a photography jaunt in the countryside snapping the normal everyday wildlife – a fox a bird a dinosaur! A DINOSAUR?!! Mr Bean is terrified until he realises what fame and fortune it could bring him. Does he get the photograph of a lifetime or is the situation not quite as it seems?

programme.title: Tom and Jerry Gokko
programme.desc: Rainbow Candy Shop. Tom is taking selfies and enjoying a sweet snack at the candy shop, when Jerry and Tuffy sneak up and eat his strawberries. Tom proceeds to chase after them, but Tuffy falls into the claw machine. Jerry tries to save him, and Tom fishes them out. Tom makes Tuffy cry and apologizes by feeding him sweets.

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Lamput Docs and Robot. Lamput is stuck in the lab with a dangerous robot on the loose! It’s up to the combined effort of the two Docs and the entire Lab team to save him before it is too late.

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: The Docs Express. The Docs are on holiday and board a high-speed train only to realise that Lamput is also on the same train, except he’s in First Class! During the train journey, the Docs try to get from Coach into First Class but are refused entry by the train’s Captain. They then disguise themselves as train staff and finally get in, ready to capture the unsuspecting Lamput.

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Clowning Around. The Docs and Lamput are excited because the FunFair is in town! But after the Docs cause havoc for the Carnival Clown during his juggling act, Lamput tries to make things right. The Clown is delighted in his new found friend and the two of them disappear into his House of Fun, with the Docs giving chase. But not all is as it seems inside the mysterious fun house, and the Docs have to come up with a cunning plan to capture Lamput and avoid upsetting the Clown any more!

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Lamput & The Elephant. The Docs chase Lamput into the darkest jungle, where they have a go at the literal oldest trick in the book: a covered pit trap. Why these guys think this will work is anyone’s guess.Edit m

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Lamput is a gooey orange nutcase that has escaped from the asylum! Two Docs are out to get him, but the problem is they can never catch him becasue Lamput is a master of disguise!

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Sleepwalking. Specs will never learn about watching horror movies before bed. He can never sleep afterwards. He jumps at every strange noise - including the ones Skinny's making downstairs, as he blends up a smoothie IN HIS SLEEP.

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Lamput is a gooey orange nutcase that has escaped from the asylum! Two Docs are out to get him, but the problem is they can never catch him becasue Lamput is a master of disguise!

programme.title: SuperThings: Rivals of Kaboom - Kazoom Power
programme.desc: Wreck Delivery Service. The villains have discovered the location of Enigma’s base and the Kazoom Kids must protect it from an attack led by Mr. King.

programme.title: Ben 10 II
programme.desc: While on a seemingly endless summer vacation with his Grandpa Max and Cousin Gwen, Ben Tennyson discovers an alien watch: the Omnitrix. This device gives Ben the ability to transform into any one of ten spectacular and powerful aliens! Ben, Gwen and Max travel the country in their motor home affectionately known as the Rust Bucket seeing the sights, stumbling into adventures and beating down would-be villains while generally having a blast!

programme.title: Ben 10 II
programme.desc: While on a seemingly endless summer vacation with his Grandpa Max and Cousin Gwen, Ben Tennyson discovers an alien watch: the Omnitrix. This device gives Ben the ability to transform into any one of ten spectacular and powerful aliens! Ben, Gwen and Max travel the country in their motor home affectionately known as the Rust Bucket seeing the sights, stumbling into adventures and beating down would-be villains while generally having a blast!

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: If You Can't Scooby-Doo the Time Don't Scooby-Doo the Crime. Fred is excited to visit The Vault - a high security prison from which no convict has ever escaped. But when the ghost of Stealing Stan (JOHN DiMAGGIO), an inmate who always claimed to be innocent, terrorizes the prison, Fred has to solve the mystery and rethink his stance on criminal justice!

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: The Lift. Mr Bean sees a new toy car in the window of the local department store Havlotts and decides he must have it. But on the way to the toy department Mr Bean gets stuck in the lift. He tries his best to entertain his fellow passengers but they aren’t very appreciative. How can Mr Bean resolve the situation and get the toy he so desperately wants?

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Dig This. Mr Bean attempts to build a shady gazebo in the back garden on a scorching hot day. But as he digs into the ground he unearths a huge unexploded bomb. Trying to make Mrs Wicket aware of the danger and save Scrapper and Teddy from being blown to smithereens takes courage nerve and a Bean styled homemade bomb disposal kit.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Bean Hypnotised. Mr Bean goes to the theatre to see a performance by a celebrated hypnotist Dr Daze. Bean is super keen to come up on stage and be part of the show. But after being hypnotized Bean unknowingly leaves the theatre not realizing that he is still under the influence and certain trigger sounds have him doing silly things at unexpected and embarrassing moments.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Hopping Mad! When the frogspawn in Mr. Bean’s bath hatch out, it’s the last thing his landlady needs, especially when she’s invited the Mayor for tea. Hundreds of angry amphibians decide to invite themselves as well. Bean proves to be no expert at catching slippery green things that won’t stop hopping about all over the blinking place.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: In a vast natural reserve lost in the middle of the untamed wilderness, there is a small haven of human civilization: the forest ranger's house. Because he is (from his point of view) the most evolved animal on earth, the bear Grizzy feels it's only natural that the ranger's house becomes his territory as soon as its owner is away. No other animal dares to contest this 'bear's privilege,' except the most inoffensive, stupid and ridiculous mammal family that exists: the Lemmings - who also move into the house as soon as the ranger is gone. Grizzy and the Lemmings lead a merciless battle over the house in an atmosphere of total madness, where the two adversaries constantly try to outdo each other with nasty tricks!

They are a team of incredible crimefighters who have banded together to oppose evil, combat crime and clean up the streets of Gotham City. They are...okay, they're NOT Batman and Robin. They're the Batwheels - an awesome group of sentient super-powered crime-fighting vehicles defending Gotham City alongside Batman, Robin, Batgirl and a host of DC Super Heroes. Having just been created by the Batcomputer, our heroes are essentially kids with little to no life experience. Led by Bam (The Batmobile), the Batwheels - Bibi (The Batgirl Cycle), Red (The Redbird), Jett (The Batwing) and Buff (The Bat Truck) - must navigate the growing pains of being a newly formed super team as well as the growing pains that come with just being a kid.

programme.title: Meet the Batwheels
programme.desc: Batwheels, a preschool animated action-adventure comedy series starring the most heroic and iconic vehicles from the DC universe. They are a team of incredible crimefighters who have banded together to oppose evil, combat crime and clean up the streets of Gotham City. They are...okay, they're NOT Batman and Robin. They're the Batwheels - an awesome group of sentient super-powered crime-fighting vehicles defending Gotham City alongside Batman, Robin, Batgirl and a host of DC Super Heroes.

programme.title: Bugs Bunny Builders II
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny Builders brings the wackiness, humor and slapstick we've grown to love to a new preschool audience. At ACME Construction Company, Bugs Bunny and Lola Bunny manage a crew of builders that, quite frankly, should not be anywhere near a construction site. However, by working together as a team, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, Tweety and others use their tools and wild vehicles to pull off some of the looniest construction jobs ever.

programme.title: Bugs Bunny Builders II

programme.title: Bugs Bunny Builders II
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny Builders brings the wackiness, humor and slapstick we've grown to love to a new preschool audience. At ACME Construction Company, Bugs Bunny and Lola Bunny manage a crew of builders that, quite frankly, should not be anywhere near a construction site. However, by working together as a team, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, Tweety and others use their tools and wild vehicles to pull off some of the looniest construction jobs ever.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show II
programme.desc: The Tortoise Don't Play Fair. When a Hare loses to a Tortoise in the biggest race of the year, he comes to Tom and Jerry claiming foul play. It's up to the duo to see what's really behind the most famous race in history.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show II
programme.desc: Fish Out of Water. Hildie and Beatie return from the Ol' Time Goblin Fair with kettle corn, a giant stuffed warlock, and a piranha they won in the ball toss. Despite their warning not to touch the fish, Tom can't pass up a chance to eat the catch of the day! But first he has to get past Jerry who is determined to protect his new friend. When a failed attempt by Tom ends up with the fish bowl being shattered, Jerry quickly casts a spell with the wand that allows the fish to breathe on dry land! The liberated fish is excited to explore his newfound freedom (walking on his tail fin) and ends up making life a lot more complicated for Jerry who's trying to protect him!

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show II
programme.desc: Cat Match Fever. Butch is bobbing for apple cores when he spots a dolled up Toodles heading his way! Butch slicks back his hair with some lard and strikes a pose. But she walks right past the alley cat. Meanwhile, inside the house, Tom spots Toodles headed in his direction. After a quick spruce up, Tom opens the door only to watch her walk right past the house. Tom slumps. Turns out Toodles is headed to Winston's house. Yep, who knew the two were a match made in kitty heaven (or at least that's what the catmatch app said). Tom and Butch both set out to win Toodles affection while Jerry plays Cyrano to Winston to help him get over his nerves.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show II
programme.desc: Cold Snap. Wanting to cool off from the blistering heat, Tom and Jerry use a little magic to make it snow, turning the witches' world into a haunted winter wonderland with an evil snowman, haunted snow forts and magic snowball fights. Now they have to figure out how to make it stop snowing.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show II
programme.desc: Novel Idea. An overflowing trash bin filled with crumpled paper can mean only one thing…Tom is writing a novel - it's a mystery novel, of course! Tom soon realizes his book is playing out in real life (including the femme fatale who has taken an interest in the feline Mikey Spillane). At first, Tom has fun crafting his own fate, but soon realizes no matter how hard he tries to rewrite his story, he gets deeper and deeper into trouble. Jerry begins to suspect the alley cat, Butch, is up to no good – in the end, Jerry figures out Butch was retrieving Tom's discarded writing from the trash and using it to his advantage!

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show III
programme.desc: Someone's in the Kitchen with Mynah. Ginger brings home a new pet—a mynah bird who can mimic anyone and anything. Rick complains about the money they will have to spend to feed and care for another pet. Spike and Tom are on notice, as somebody's got to go.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show III
programme.desc: Don't Cut the Cheese. It's that special time of year when the Lady of the House's rare, exotic (and very stinky) cheese gets delivered to the manor. It's up to Tom to make sure not a crumb of this cheese—known to be a favorite of mice—goes missing.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show III
programme.desc: When You Leash Expect It. Ginger decides she wants to teach Tom to walk on a leash to ensure he gets much-needed exercise. Tom hates the leash and does not want to go for a walk. Finally, they're on their way, much to Tom's chagrin. Back home, Jerry and Tuffy proceed to raid the fridge.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show III
programme.desc: Calamari Jerry. Ginger leaves some frozen fish on the kitchen counter to thaw. Ginger and Rick warn Tom to keep his paws away, or he will not get anything to eat. Soon, a live baby octopus crawls out of the mouth of one of the thawing fish and jumps off the counter, looking for a place to hide. Jerry befriends him and does his best to protect him from Tom.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show III
programme.desc: The iconic cat and mouse rivals are back. The all-new series takes another look at the madcap slapstick and never-ending battle that has made Tom and Jerry two of the most beloved characters of all time.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show III
programme.desc: Cattyshack. It's time for the annual croquet tournament at the Manor. The butler tells Tom how important it is to the Lady of the Manor to always win…no matter what! The last thing they need is any pesky rodents interfering with the game. Knowing any sighting of Jerry or Tuffy would cast Tom in a bad light, he's determined to keep them off the lawn.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show III
programme.desc: Live and Let Diet. The Lady of the Manor's prize Pomeranian, Alfred, must get some pounds off before the big dog show. The butler suggests exercise—chasing a cat perhaps? Tom happily obliges, as Alfred's successful weight loss guarantees him a cushy spot upstairs. Meanwhile, Jerry aims to sabotage Tom's efforts.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: The iconic cat and mouse rivals are back. The all-new series takes another look at the madcap slapstick and never-ending battle that has made Tom and Jerry two of the most beloved characters of all time.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings IV
programme.desc: In a vast natural reserve lost in the middle of the untamed wilderness, there is a small haven of human civilization: the forest ranger's house. Because he is (from his point of view) the most evolved animal on earth, the bear Grizzy feels it's only natural that the ranger's house becomes his territory as soon as its owner is away. No other animal dares to contest this "bear's privilege" except the most inoffensive, stupid and ridiculous mammal family that exists: the Lemmings - who also move into the house as soon as the ranger is gone. Grizzy and the Lemmings lead a merciless battle over the house in an atmosphere of total madness, where the two adversaries constantly try to outdo each other with nasty tricks!

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings IV

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Join the strange but hilariously funny Mr Bean and his stuffed teddy on adventures such as avoiding an irate landlady or an evil one-eyed cat.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Ice Cream. Mr Bean wants an ice cream from the ice cream van. But by the time he gets to the front of the queue the ice-cream man has gone to lunch. Bean takes it upon himself to climb through in an open window and into the back of the van from where he starts to help himself. Unfortunately he soon attracts a crowd and is forced to serve a long queue of kids until all the ice cream runs out. When the ice-cream man comes back from lunch and drives away he is unaware that Bean is still hiding in the back of his van en route to the ice cream factory.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: Birthday Party. Mr Bean is feeling very left out when he discovers that Mrs Wicket is having a huge party downstairs and apparently he isn’t invited. Bean tries every trick in the book to sneak himself into the party – even resorting to hiding inside an enormous cake. If only he knew the real reason for the celebration.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series II
programme.desc: In The Garden. Mr Bean’s attempt to cut the grass is thwarted by a pesky root which refuses to budge. When Mr Bean breaks his spade he heads to the local Garden Centre to find a replacement. But instead of simply buying one he enters a gardening competition to win one - judged by none other than the Queen herself! Its gardening gloves off when Mr Bean goes into battle with his rival green-fingered competitors.

programme.title: Moley
programme.desc: Moley is a lively animated comedy series for children and families of all ages. It follows the underground adventures of a charmingly optimistic young mole, Moley. As the keeper of The Mystical Manual of Magic — known more affectionately as “Manny,” Moley is forever embarking on comedic, zany, Moletastic and thrilling magical adventures which are filled with heart, to help the citizens of the bustling city of MoleTown. What Moley lacks in physical prowess and smarts, he makes up for in heart and friendship! So, with his friends Dotty, a plucky, adventure-seeking mole, Mishmosh, an oddball inventor mole, Mona Lisa, the sensible grounded Mole and Mystic Mole, a wise old mole who knows more than he lets on - there’s no challenge Moley can’t mishandle-- but then soon overcome!

programme.title: Meet the Batwheels
programme.desc: Batwheels, a preschool animated action-adventure comedy series starring the most heroic and iconic vehicles from the DC universe. They are a team of incredible crimefighters who have banded together to oppose evil, combat crime and clean up the streets of Gotham City. They are...okay, they're NOT Batman and Robin. They're the Batwheels - an awesome group of sentient super-powered crime-fighting vehicles defending Gotham City alongside Batman, Robin, Batgirl and a host of DC Super Heroes.

programme.title: Mush-Mush And The Mushables
programme.desc: Mush-Mush and the Mushables follows the comedy adventures of the Mushable community as together they put the fun back into fungi! As pocket-sized Guardians of the Forest, each Mushable has a special gift; while Mush-Mush can communicate with nature, Lilit shines bright like the light and Chep has an impressive memory. As they get to know thier talents and their limits, the Mushables find there is still a lot to discover about growing up! A fun journey of self-discovery, exciting outdoor adventure and mush mush more!

programme.title: Mush-Mush And The Mushables

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Dragon Bros. The Docs are in the mountains, doing mountainy things. They look through their binoculars and see Lamput in the distance, doing his own mountainy things. GET HIM! After a dramatic chase across the mountain range, Lamput escapes into a cave and the Docs pursue, but it's no ordinary cave. It's the home of a very grumpy dragon who loves his beauty sleep! The Docs are captured and Lamput has to come to the rescue to save the day. Luckily for him, his new forest buddies and his specular musical skills might just help in coming up with a solution.

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: The Little Ghost Prince. The Docs chase Lamput to a haunted mansion populated by ghosts, monsters and all things spooky. Lamput makes quick friends with a ghost prince who happens to be the lord of the mansion, but the Docs run into much less friendlier characters while trying to catch Lamput.

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Lamput is a gooey orange nutcase that has escaped from the asylum! Two Docs are out to get him, but the problem is they can never catch him becasue Lamput is a master of disguise!

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Back to School. Lamput is hiding in a school, and the only way for the Docs to get him is to anti-age zap themselves back into childhood. After stalking him in the corridors and unsuccessfully evading detention slips from the Headteacher, they find themselves in class. Skinny is rather happy to be back, but Specs doesn't like tests or art or chemistry or anything that distracts him from his true objective. Each time they almost get him, Lamput is saved by the bell (and even becomes the bell), and it's a race against home time to see if they can get Lamput before the Headteacher gets them.

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Power of Moustache. After failing to catch Lamput again and again, the Docs notice that they lack something crucial in order to be successful in life, a good moustache! With their new found facial hair, the world now bends to their will!

programme.title: SuperThings: Rivals of Kaboom - Kazoom Power
programme.desc: Pop-Corn Revenge. Kai and Finn must prevent the cinema’s destruction during a fight between Pop Shock and Bubbles, caused by poor-quality popcorn.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings

No other animal dares to contest this 'bear's privilege,' except the most inoffensive, stupid and ridiculous mammal family that exists: the Lemmings - who also move into the house as soon as the ranger is gone. programme.title: Ben 10 II
programme.desc: While on a seemingly endless summer vacation with his Grandpa Max and Cousin Gwen, Ben Tennyson discovers an alien watch: the Omnitrix. This device gives Ben the ability to transform into any one of ten spectacular and powerful aliens! Ben, Gwen and Max travel the country in their motor home affectionately known as the Rust Bucket seeing the sights, stumbling into adventures and beating down would-be villains while generally having a blast!

programme.title: Ben 10 II
programme.desc: While on a seemingly endless summer vacation with his Grandpa Max and Cousin Gwen, Ben Tennyson discovers an alien watch: the Omnitrix. This device gives Ben the ability to transform into any one of ten spectacular and powerful aliens! Ben, Gwen and Max travel the country in their motor home affectionately known as the Rust Bucket seeing the sights, stumbling into adventures and beating down would-be villains while generally having a blast!

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: Trading Chases. Fred switches places with Jeff, the tour guide at a history museum, to give him a chance to lead the Gang in solving a mystery. The mystery: a frightening Egyptian crocodile deity is terrorizing the museum. The problem: Fred is instantly jealous of this new guy and sets out to solve the mystery before Jeff can - with the help of Jeff's tour group of children!

programme.title: Be Cool, Scooby-Doo!
programme.desc: Kitchen Frightmare. Shaggy and Scooby's favorite chef is finally opening his own restaurant but a monstrous Yeti threatens the opening night. The gang has to solve the mystery before dessert is served, while Shaggy and Scooby have to resist eating all the food that's meant for the customers!

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Double Trouble. Mr. Bean is over the moon when he meets Mr. Pod because both men have so much in common; same shirt, jacket, trousers and underpants. And to top it all, Pod is Bean’s spitting image! Bean falls to Earth with a bump, though, when his girlfriend, Irma Gobb, finds Mr. Pod much better looking than him.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series III
programme.desc: Mr Bean returns for a third series of his animated adventures. Featuring in 26 brand new episodes. This series follows Mr Bean, his best friend Teddy and his long-suffering landlady Mrs Wicket as we witness more of the mishaps that surround Mr Bean's daily life. Mr Bean becomes obsessed with computer gaming, prevents Mrs. Wicket from selling her house, builds his own caravan, rescues a football from a haunted house and finds himself in many other hilarious escapades. All voiced by Rowan Atkinson.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series III
programme.desc: Mr Bean returns for a third series of his animated adventures. Featuring in 26 brand new episodes. All voiced by Rowan Atkinson.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings IV
programme.desc: In a vast natural reserve lost in the middle of the untamed wilderness, there is a small haven of human civilization: the forest ranger's house. Because he is (from his point of view) the most evolved animal on earth, the bear Grizzy feels it's only natural that the ranger's house becomes his territory as soon as its owner is away. No other animal dares to contest this "bear's privilege" except the most inoffensive, stupid and ridiculous mammal family that exists: the Lemmings - who also move into the house as soon as the ranger is gone. Grizzy and the Lemmings lead a merciless battle over the house in an atmosphere of total madness, where the two adversaries constantly try to outdo each other with nasty tricks!

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: Sleuth or Consequences. Butch and a squirrel detective have set up shop across the street from Tom and Jerry and are stealing all their customers by using high-tech devices to solve crimes. Tom and Jerry challenge them to a competition to solve one final case - they must either find a goldfish's missing gold chest or close up shop.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: Dinner is Swerved. When Rick and Ginger leave Tom home alone, Tom and Jerry decide to invite their lady friends Toodles and Toots over for a romantic dinner. Things don't go as planned when they start to all get in each other's way and food fights and tempers rise as dinner goes haywire.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: Bottled Up Emotions. Dr. Bigby works on creating a formula for a love potion, which accidentally gets on Jerry when Napoleon tries to use it against Tom. Napoleon must work with Hamster and Bot to stop Tom from eating a lovestruck Jerry. Things go awry as his potions create a range of emotions from all the lab residents.

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.desc: The iconic cat and mouse rivals are back. The all-new series takes another look at the madcap slapstick and never-ending battle that has made Tom and Jerry two of the most beloved characters of all time.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: In the wild. Inspired by a wildlife documentary on TV, Mr. Bean dusts off his camera and treks deep into the countryside in search of the perfect wildlife photograph. After two fruitless days of being the hunter, he is somewhat miffed to find himself the hunted.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series
programme.desc: Missing Teddy. Whilst browsing the supermarket for lovely grub, Mr. Bean’s life-long pal, Teddy, is kidnapped. Bean tracks down the nasty men responsible and finds that Teddy is not their only captive. Mr. Bean rescues a hundred teddy bears once their ears are put through an industrial sewing machine.

programme.title: Mr Bean: The Animated Series III
programme.desc: Mr Bean returns for a third series of his animated adventures. Featuring in 26 brand new episodes. This series follows Mr Bean, his best friend Teddy and his long-suffering landlady Mrs Wicket as we witness more of the mishaps that surround Mr Bean's daily life. Mr Bean becomes obsessed with computer gaming, prevents Mrs. Wicket from selling her house, builds his own caravan, rescues a football from a haunted house and finds himself in many other hilarious escapades. All voiced by Rowan Atkinson.

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Break Out. The Docs finally catch Lamput! Mission accomplished…and now they have nothing to do. Every other job to catch lab experiments gone rogue is a piece of cake compared to Lamput. Realizing that they’ve lost their lives’ purpose, Specs and Skinny decide to break Lamput out of the lab’s hi-tech prison so that they can go back to catching him again.

programme.title: Lamput III
programme.desc: Lamput is a gooey orange nutcase that has escaped from the asylum! Two Docs are out to get him, but the problem is they can never catch him becasue Lamput is a master of disguise!

programme.title: Lamput IV
programme.desc: Magic Marker. After the Docs constantly fail to catch Lamput with the power of science and technology, they come across an unlikely source to help them with their troubles - Magic! A witch offers them a magic marker that gives them any supernatural powers they draw on their skin. Lamput must now escape and Skinny with their new magical power!

programme.title: Tom and Jerry Gokko
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry Gokko celebrates the calmness and simplicity of everyday life and embraces play between our iconic characters and showcases their friendly rivalries and friendships in this cute new stylization.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Batwheels, a preschool animated action-adventure comedy series starring the most heroic and iconic vehicles from the DC universe. They are a team of incredible crimefighters who have banded together to oppose evil, combat crime and clean up the streets of Gotham City. They are...okay, they're NOT Batman and Robin. They're the Batwheels - an awesome group of sentient super-powered crime-fighting vehicles defending Gotham City alongside Batman, Robin, Batgirl and a host of DC Super Heroes. Having just been created by the Batcomputer, our heroes are essentially kids with little to no life experience. Led by Bam (The Batmobile), the Batwheels - Bibi (The Batgirl Cycle), Red (The Redbird), Jett (The Batwing) and Buff (The Bat Truck) - must navigate the growing pains of being a newly formed super team as well as the growing pains that come with just being a kid.

programme.title: Batwheels
programme.desc: Batwheels, a preschool animated action-adventure comedy series starring the most heroic and iconic vehicles from the DC universe. They are a team of incredible crimefighters who have banded together to oppose evil, combat crime and clean up the streets of Gotham City. They are...okay, they're NOT Batman and Robin.
